title: Ruleset
description: A reusable set of ignore patterns. Compiles to .stignore (Syncthing) and filter.rclone (rclone).

name.description: Stable identifier referenced by folders. Lowercase, kebab-case.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes to this YAML's shape.

imports.description: Resolved top-down by gitignore-importer; later entries override earlier (last match wins).

excludes.description: Patterns to ignore. gitignore syntax (POSIX forward slashes).

includes.description: Negations — keep these even if a previous rule excluded them. Prefix with '!'.

engine_overrides.description: Engine-specific extras for cases the unified pattern can't express identically.

extra.description: Appended verbatim to the generated .stignore (after the unified patterns).
Appended verbatim to filter.rclone. Each line must start with '+ ' or '- '.
